aliases: Platinum 8 MP Panoramic Fixed Turret IP Camera
features: dual 1/1.8" sensor 180 degree panoramic stitched image
white supplemental light LEDs, range up to 40m (131ft)
pan -30 to 30 / tilt -75 to 75 angle adjustment
release_notes: LTS (LT Security Inc.) is a US-based distributor selling Hikvision OEM hardware under its own model numbering (Platinum, Pro-X, Sapphire, Pro-VS lines). Hikvision-derived firmware ships with ONVIF disabled by default since v5.5.0 — must be manually enabled under Configuration > Network > Advanced Settings > Integration Protocol before use with Frigate/Home Assistant/third-party NVRs.

frigate.notes: Standard Hikvision-OEM RTSP path convention likely applies but not independently confirmed for this exact model. Panoramic dual-sensor cameras typically expose the stitched panoramic stream and each individual sensor as separate channels — check the camera's own web UI for the full channel list before assuming channel 101/102 covers everything you want. ONVIF must be manually enabled (disabled by default on Hikvision firmware v5.5.0+).

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF must be manually enabled first (see release_notes).

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed for this specific model.
